name: Nonprofit Hospital Communication Tax Exemption

eligibility.description: Must be a hospital referred to in section 170(b)(1)(A)(iii) and exempt from income tax under section 501(a); requires filing an exemption certificate with the service provider.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts nonprofit hospitals from the 3% federal excise tax on all communication services.
